query: I want to build a notification system for our app. Let's spec it out before writing any code.
Write a PRD for a user onboarding flow that includes email verification and a welcome wizard.
I have an idea for a new feature - a client portal where customers can see their project status. Plan it out.
Before we start coding, I need a full spec for the admin dashboard including roles and permissions.
Let's do spec-before-code on this: I want to add Stripe billing integration to the SaaS app.
Build me a search feature for the knowledge base. I want to think through the requirements first.
I need a product requirements document for a mobile-responsive calendar booking widget.
Help me plan a new API endpoint system for third-party integrations - full spec with edge cases.
I want to add multi-tenant support to our app. This is a big change so let's plan carefully before touching code.
Spec out a file upload feature with drag-and-drop, progress bars, and virus scanning. Don't code yet.
There's a bug where the login page crashes on Safari. Can you fix it?
Review this pull request and tell me if the code looks good.
Write documentation for our existing authentication module.
Refactor this component to use React hooks instead of class components.
What's the best project management tool for a small dev team?
Add unit tests for the payment processing service.
Update the README with the new environment variables we added last sprint.
Our API is returning 500 errors intermittently. Help me debug it.
Optimize this database query - it's taking 30 seconds to run.
How should I structure my project folders for a Next.js app?
